rationale: The citing paper’s focus on dynamic promotion effects and postpromotion behavior (in Dominick’s scanner data) closely overlaps with the cited paper’s core contribution on pre/postpromotion dip elasticities and their determinants, also using Dominick’s data. This looks like a likely foundational or direct comparison source for the citing paper’s dynamic price-promotion framing rather than a generic background mention. The pair is explicitly linked by a DOI-matched reference (10.1509/jmkr.41.3.339.35992).
